audit_items.proof_trace: Deduplication uses complete key (slot, proposer_index, index) via HashMap<(slot, proposer), HashSet<index>>. Initial check (verify_is_unknown_sidecar at L484) uses read lock, then observe_gossip_data_column (L521) performs double-check under write lock (L801-805), preventing TOCTOU races. All acceptance paths enforce this check.
